text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her debut not long behind her, we joined
some much-needed scrimmages to bolster her
ability to compete in large groups, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Pant... Third place?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Damn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In one scrimmage she'll take first, then take sixth
in the next. And then first again. Her results
refuse to stabilize.
choice_data_list:
(She's just going to get stressed out at this
rate...)

(She's just going to get stressed out at this
rate...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But through these scrimmages, I've come to
identify her problem...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Graaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When challenged by another runner, she focuses
her energy on the challenger until they back
down, for the entire race if need be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, when she races against multiple
opponents...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Think you can pass me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Narita Brian is unable to run at her natural pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're Brian's trainer, right? Is she sick or
something lately?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She hasn't been herself since her debut!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Where's that insane strength I saw during our
one-on-one?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gulp! W-Well yeah, I can't argue with that considering I absolutely got wrecked...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Urk... Come on! Don't make me remember that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hurry up and get Brian back on her feet! I only
beat people down when they're at their peak.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The longer I have to hold back now, the more I'm
gonna let loose when we race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What is it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Duh. You think there's a racer out there
that wants to lose?
choice_data_list: In that case, why don't we change our strategy?
In that case, why don't we change our strategy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...In short, if someone passes me in the middle of
the race, I should just let them?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You're telling me to just run away with my tail
between my legs when there's a challenge right in
front of me?
choice_data_list: No, that's not what I mean!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, then what do you mean?
choice_data_list:
It's not running away or holding back—it's
saving your energy for later.

It's not running away or holding back—it's
saving your energy for later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Saving energy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of her problems stem from her fierce
competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given that, if she can build that spirit up, convert
it into energy, and release it one huge burst...
choice_data_list: You can run in a way that's special to you.
You can run in a way that's special to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Special... to me?
choice_data_list:
The first across the finish line is the winner,
after all.

The first across the finish line is the winner,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You have to be more detailed than that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the next scrimmage, seven new racers come to
participate.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Since Brian's doing so poorly lately, I feel like I
can actually win!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Me too! I'm definitely not gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: "Store up and then explode," right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What about the timing?
choice_data_list: I'll leave that up to you.
I'll leave that up to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like when racing one-on-one, her
competitive instincts are excellent when she's in
full control of herself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With nothing more than that to say, she makes
her way to the gate. And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: First place is mine!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Like I'll just hand it over! Hehe, see ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the gate opens, the two racers fight
vigorously for first place. As for Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, pardon me. Do you mind if I sit next to you
and watch?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What's this? She looks much more relaxed than
before. Found a new solution, did we?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
The competition is pretty fierce at the front.
Narita Brian must be up there too.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? She's not?! She's hanging back in the middle
still!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's quite rare for her to stay out of the
action intentionally.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(Gah... So frustrating... I just want to run to the
front!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (This is actually killing me... My prey is right there, mine for the taking, and I can't chase them down!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (That's it, I can't take it anymore—I need to hunt!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha... I get it now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...So this is saving energy? You're really asking a
lot of me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're almost to the fourth turn. And the
lead... hasn't changed?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She wasn't making progress before, but I think
this settles it—Brian really is in a slump.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That can't be right... This doesn't align with my
calculations. Has she lost her passion? Or, don't
tell me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has been biding time, waiting for her
perfect moment to attack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, as they come out of the fourth turn...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(Time to go in for the kill—break through these
restraints and seize victory by the throat.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...At last, the moment I've been waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: RAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A and B
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! Narita Brian is barreling to the
front!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She's fast! How can she be so fast?! She couldn't
pass anyone before!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: How fierce! So this is how she races now!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No... the word "race" is hardly fitting. This is more
like... a hunt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian shoots forth like a bird of prey
hurtling toward its target.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no concern for her entranced audience, she
blasts across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Pfff, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? I've never felt like
this before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What were you thinking teaching me this? This
feeling could become an addiction!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian shows no signs of her usual fatigue at
the race. In fact, she is positively glowing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do believe we've taken one further step into the
future.
